# ChefOnline Partners Information Hub \| Catering Industry Updates: The latest and most important news and updates of the UK catering industry and current affairs, all in one convenient location for all restaurant businesses\.

> Expert insights for takeaways and restaurants\. Learn about online ordering systems, EPOS solutions, digital marketing and business growth with ChefOnline\.
